title: Top row mastery: Y U I O P
text: you our up yo top join trip pop play opera union youth point coupon junior trophy story open jury

tips.text: P is right pinky — practice it specifically
Y is right index reach UP

character_tips.anna: Right top row. Pinky P is the trickiest — give it extra attention.
character_tips.maxim: YUIOP completes top row. Pros never look at these keys.
character_tips.knopych: TOP ROW RIGHT! ⬆️🟢 Pinky-P powered up!
character_tips.klavochka: All your right finger friends up high, my sunshine 🌟
